title: Forlorn Hollows Inspired Gui
description: This texture pack changes your gui to an Alex's Caves Forlorn Hollows inspired version !
body:
This texture pack changes your gui to an **Alex's Caves Forlorn Hollows** inspired version !

Alex's Caves : https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves

_(Works with appleskin, Species, Farmer's Delight, Alex's Caves)_

![Hearts and Hunger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69c6884dd9eebbc0a11dfb217ad04ad6e8b72fca.png)

Cool project someone made inspired by **Forlorn Hollows Inspired Hud**: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eels-heavenly-hud

These textures were modified from the original **Alex’s Caves assets**
Credits to https://modrinth.com/user/AlexModGuy For some texture used in the **hotbar**, **xp bar**, **inventories** and **menus**.
